title: Bitsocial AI Moderation Challenge
summary: Bitsocial AI Moderation Challenge evaluates Bitsocial comment content against community rules through an OpenAI-compatible model endpoint.
notes: This package runs on a community node and does not require a hosted moderation server.
Private production prompts and API keys must stay outside the public repository.
Moderation behavior is fail-closed where AGENTS.md and tests say so; verify against source before changing policy.
